headline: Assessing Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation After FTSE All-World Index Removal
summary: Franklin Resources (BEN) was recently removed from the FTSE All-World Index, an event that can influence trading as index-tracking funds rebalance. This may affect liquidity, ownership mix and how some investors view the stock. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. At a share price of US$22.91, Franklin Resources has seen a 13.68% 1 month share price decline and softer recent momentum, despite a 25.82% 1 year total shareholder return that points to a mixed longer term picture. If...
